evals.prompt: Search for papers on deep learning based medical image segmentation
evals.expected_output: A table with 15-20 deduplicated papers ranked by relevance x citations, showing authors, title, year, venue, citation count, DOI, and open access status. Should include abstracts for top results.

expectations.text: Results include papers from at least 2 different APIs (Semantic Scholar + OpenAlex)
expectations.evidence: Check that output shows papers with different source indicators

expectations.text: Duplicates are removed - no paper appears twice
Results are sorted by relevance × log(citations)
Table includes all required columns: #, Authors, Title, Year, Venue, Cites, DOI, OA

expectations.evidence: Check for expand, citation network, literature review outline options

evals.prompt: Find recent academic literature on transformer architectures for time series forecasting
evals.expected_output: Top results should be recent (2021-2024), with a mix of conference papers (NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR) and journals. Should prioritize relevance over raw citation count.

expectations.evidence: Check year column for recent dates

expectations.text: Results cover both transformer methods and time series forecasting
arXiv is included in the search (appropriate for CS topic)
expectations.evidence: Check for arXiv papers in results

evals.prompt: What has been published on peer review automation in the last 5 years? I need to find key papers for a literature review
evals.expected_output: A focused set of papers from 2019-2024 on peer review systems, AI in peer review, or automated review processes. Should include highly cited foundational papers.

expectations.text: Results include both highly cited foundational papers and recent work
Results are relevant to peer review automation topic
expectations.evidence: Verify titles relate to peer review
